app.name: OsteoRisk-AI
app.subtitle: Reduced bone mineral density risk prediction
app.mvpNotice: The risk score is for MVP workflow testing and requires clinical validation.

common.accessDenied: You do not have permission to access this area.
common.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
common.missingOptional: Optional data is missing and does not block calculation.

summary.medium: Medium risk. Additional examinations are recommended.
summary.high: High risk. Priority referral is recommended.

patients.searchHelp: Search by name or medical record number

screening.optionalHint: These fields can be completed later
screening.historyRequiredHint: Confirm the answer to avoid an accidental No value.

pdf.title: PDF protocol preview
pdf.subtitle: Review before export
pdf.disclaimer: This system supports clinical workflow and does not replace professional clinical judgment.

recommendations.standard_diabetes_control: Continue standard diabetes follow-up and risk-factor control according to local clinical protocols.
recommendations.reassess_next_visit: Reassess screening data at the next planned visit or sooner if clinical status changes.
recommendations.workflow_disclaimer: Recommendations are MVP workflow suggestions and must be reviewed by a qualified clinician.
recommendations.additional_exams: Consider additional evaluation such as densitometry and vascular ultrasound when clinically appropriate.
recommendations.optimize_diabetes_management: Review modifiable risk factors and optimize diabetes management according to local protocols.
recommendations.urgent_specialist_referral: Arrange priority referral to appropriate specialized care based on clinical context.
recommendations.preventive_measures: Review preventive measures and patient safety planning according to local protocols.

validation.duration: Duration must be from 0 to 80 years

osteorisk.title: OsteoRisk-AI
osteorisk.subtitle: Clinical decision support prototype for predicting reduced BMD risk in patients with type 2 diabetes.
osteorisk.disclaimer: This estimate is a risk prediction and does not replace the physician's clinical decision.

sections.patientContextDescription: Use an anonymized identifier without name or phone number.
sections.demographyDescription: BMI is calculated automatically from height and weight.
sections.diabetesDescription: Key diabetes course features and microvascular complications.
sections.menopauseDescription: This section is shown only for female patients.
sections.labsDescription: Optional indicators can be left empty if unavailable.
sections.functionalDescription: Record falls and available functional test results.
sections.densitometryDescription: T-score is an optional comparison indicator.

fields.handGrip: Hand grip dynamometry, dominant hand, kg

hints.patientId: For example, an internal study code or registry ID without personal data.
hints.bmi: Read-only field, updates when height or weight changes.
hints.duration: Read-only field, calculated as current age minus menopause onset age.
hints.optionalLabs: Missing optional data does not block risk calculation.
hints.tScore: Used for comparison and clinical interpretation, not required for submission.

warnings.ageRange: Age is outside the expected 40–70 range. Calculation is allowed but requires cautious interpretation.
warnings.highFallRisk: TUG ≥20 seconds: visual marker of high fall risk.

result.title: Prediction result
result.emptyDescription: Fill in the form and run calculation.
result.emptyText: After form submission, the panel will show probability, risk category, top 3 SHAP factors, and recommendation.
result.outdated: Form data changed after calculation. Recalculate risk to refresh the result.

shap.title: Top 3 SHAP factors
shap.mockNotice: Factors are shown in mock/development mode and require clinical model validation.

validation.ageMax: Age must be from 1 to 120 years
validation.height: Height must be from 140 to 220 cm
validation.weight: Weight must be from 40 to 200 kg
validation.menopauseOnset: Menopause onset age must be from 30 to 70 years
validation.menopauseAfterAge: Menopause onset age cannot be greater than current age

errors.patient_external_id_already_exists: A patient with this anonymized ID already exists.
errors.patient_unique_constraint_violation: A patient with this identifier or medical record number already exists.
errors.pdf_generation_failed: PDF could not be generated. Please try again later.
